title: End-to-end demo project
objective: Create a compact end-to-end demo that shows the complete MVP flow from empty folder to Target Repo factory to run artifacts.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Add examples/e2e-demo or equivalent that can be regenerated from the CLI.
Include demo answers, expected planning docs, expected build-handoff, example task, and expected run artifacts.
Add a single script that runs the demo locally without network access.
Document the demo path for portfolio reviewers and future agents.
Ensure normal smoke test remains fast and deterministic.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: 빈 폴더에서 planning→factory→run까지 보여주는 데모 프로젝트를 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
